name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve HireTrack
title: '[BUG] '
labels: 'bug'

---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 📸 Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or console log traces to help explain your problem.

## 💻 Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows, macOS]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Firefox]
- Node Version: [e.g. v18.17.0]
